creator: utisoft@googlemail.com
text:
2009/7/26 Chris Rees <utisoft@googlemail.com>:
> OK, sorry about this. I've just noticed the port doesn't respect
> PREFIX properly (looks for libraries in the wrong place), so this
> patch here makes it do that, and also adds Glen Barber's master site.
> This means you can ignore the previous followup.
>
> If you like, I'll just shar the whole thing up again :)
>
> Chris
>

And I spelt Glen's web address wrong too; I feel like crying with
embarrassment now... Right, this is the last patch, promise (this is
against the original). Please disregard _all_ the followups I posted.
It's due to rushing :(

Chris


-- 
A: Because it messes up the order in which people normally read text.
